title: Meta data or tags for columns to use with filters
excerpt: There is currently no way to filter by multiple columns at once with something such as a column tag. This feature would be especially useful for complex formulas or graph widgets, with use cases such as ratings collected…

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: There is currently no way to filter by multiple columns at once with something such as a column tag. This feature would be especially useful for complex formulas or graph widgets, with use cases such as ratings collected from workdocs
